# Asher Morse - Portfolio

> Asher Morse is a software developer who values clean, consistent code and collaborative teamwork. Specialized in Swift, Collaborative Problem Solving, Amazon Web Services (AWS), and Artificial Intelligence (AI).

I am an efficient and people-oriented software developer driven by a passion for learning. I strive to deliver high-quality solutions while continuously expanding my skills and helping others grow.

## Experience

- [Software Engineer @ Trilogy](https://www.ashermorse.org/#experience): Mar 2025 - Present, Austin, TX (Hybrid)
- [Software Developer @ Gauntlet AI](https://www.ashermorse.org/#experience): Jan 2025 - Mar 2025, Austin, TX (On-site)

## Education

- [Self-taught - Computer Software Engineering](https://www.ashermorse.org/#education)
- [Lake Washington Institute of Technology - Running Start](https://www.ashermorse.org/#education): Sep 2023 - Jun 2024
